faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Mill Basin typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Mill Basin residents in most cases. We understand that mouse infestations require immediate attention, and our team is ready to respond quickly to protect your home and family from these unwanted pests.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive mouse extermination includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, exclusion services to seal access points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.
